title: Project Create 2
description: Create based Modpack focusing on automation and factory aesthetics
body: Project Create 2 is the new and improved version of Skeej's YouTube modpack, refined and upgraded to provide a upgraded and much more seamless experience through create's tech tree and addons. Progress and automate parts from mods like _Create: New Age_ and _Create: Crafts and additions_ in order to work towards the super powerful late game mods like _Create: Ore Excavation_ and _Applied Energistics 2_ and the automations they bring with new custom recipes to make them a true challenge to progress towards! Though no factory is complete without a building to go with it! With the help of building mods like _Chipped_ and _Create: Deco_ to truly build the factories of your dreams!
